body:
This PR:
 - Moves `ClimaODEFunction` into `functions.jl`
 - Renames `make_IMKGAlgorithm ` to `make_IMKGTableau`
 - Moves the export for `AbstractIMEXARKTableau` into the same file its defined
title: Cleanup and fix names

body: This PR moves `theoretical_convergence_order` to the test directory, and instead extends `OrdinaryDiffEq.alg_order`. Soon, `alg_order` will be moved to DIffEqBase or SciMLBase, so that we can move it back into src without adding OrdinaryDiffEq as a dependency.
title: Move `theoretical_convergence_order` to test dir, extend `ODE.alg_order`
